title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Capgemini India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Capgemini India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Capgemini India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About Capgemini India:
Capgemini India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capgemini India!
